title: LegenVD
description: Magic the Gathering strategy videos with a focus on the digital Magic Arena.This channel is supported by its fans on Patreon: https://www.patreon.com/LegenVD

videos.title: I cast every version of Emrakul.
videos.description:
Magic: The Gathering Arena deck tech & gameplay with a colorless Eldrazi ramp deck, featuring Emrakul, the Aeons Torn as commander in Brawl.

Patreon: https://www.patreon.com/LegenVD

0:00:00 - Intro
0:02:18 - Deck Tech
0:10:17 - vs Elanor Gardner
0:16:20 - vs Nicol Bolas, God-Pharaoh
0:21:46 - vs Chulane, Teller of Tales
0:27:09 - vs Sami, Wildcat Captain
0:34:57 - vs Dina, Soul Steeper
0:41:28 - vs Bonny Pall, Clearcutter
0:45:11 - vs Tifa Lockhart
0:46:46 - vs Tidus & Clive
0:51:22 - vs Nicanzil, Current Conductor
0:57:29 - vs The Wandering Minstrel

Decklist: 
https://aetherhub.com/Deck/emrakul-the-aeons-torn-brawl
